urt.t: abbr. upper respiratory tract 上呼吸道; upright 直立的; 竖式的; utility radio transmitter 万用无线电广播发射机

urth.t: [网络] 苍天；命运女神；尔斯

urtica.d: n a nettle yielding fiber resembling flax

urticaceae.d: n a family of plants of order Urticales including many nettles with stinging hairs

urticaceous.d:
a. Of or pertaining to a natural order (Urticaceae) of
   plants, of which the nettle is the type. The order includes also the
   hop, the elm, the mulberry, the fig, and many other plants.

urticales.t: [网络] 荨麻目；荨麻部；搳镑醴

urticant.t:
a. 痒的
[医] 刺痒的

urticaria.t:
n. 荨麻疹
[医] 荨麻疹
urticaria.d: n an itchy skin eruption characterized by weals with pale interiors and well-defined red margins; usually the result of an allergic response to insect bites or food or drugs

urticaria bullosa.t: [医] 大疱性荨麻疹, 水泡性荨麻疹

urticaria edematosa.t: [医] 水肿性荨麻疹, 血管神经性水肿

urticaria macalosa.t: [医] 斑性荨麻疹, 红色荨麻疹

urticaria papulosa.t: [医] 丘疹性荨麻疹, 荨麻疹性苔癣

urticaria perstans verrucosa.t: [医] 疣状顽固性荨麻疹, 结节性痒疹

urticaria pigmentosa.t: [医] 着色性荨麻疹, 类黄瘤

urticaria tuberosa.t: [医] 结节性荨麻疹, 血管神经性水肿

urticate.t:
vt. 刺痛
vi. 诱发荨麻症, 产生痒块
urticate.d: v. whip with or as with nettles

urticated.t: v. 有风块的( urticate的过去式和过去分词 )

urticates.t: v. 有风块的( urticate的第三人称单数 )
urticates.d:
v whip with or as with nettles
v sting with or as with nettles and cause a stinging pain or sensation

urticating.t: v. 有风块的( urticate的现在分词 )
urticating.d: p. pr. & vb. n. of Urticate

urtication.d:
n an itchy skin eruption characterized by weals with pale interiors and well-defined red margins; usually the result of an allergic response to insect bites or food or drugs
n a sensation of having been stung by nettles

urubu.t: n. (从阿根廷到美国南部一带产的)黑秃鹫,食腐肉的乌鸦
urubu.d:
n. The black vulture (Catharista atrata). It ranges from the
   Southern United States to South America. See Vulture.

uruguay.t:
n. 乌拉圭
[经] 乌拉圭
uruguay.d: n. a South American republic on the southeast coast of South America; achieved independence from Brazil in 1825
